essence: Produces precision tools, jigs, and fixtures used in manufacturing and assembly processes.

identity.title: Toolmaker
identity.summary: Manufactures and maintains specialised tooling, using precision machining, grinding, and inspection techniques.

salary.notes: Highly skilled toolmakers with experience in precision and aerospace tooling are well rewarded.

qualifications: Apprenticeship or NVQ in toolmaking or precision engineering
Experience with lathes, mills, grinders, and inspection tools
Ability to read engineering drawings and tolerances
Strong attention to detail and measurement skills

lifestyle.description: Workshop‑based craft with precision work, long periods at machines, and a focus on quality and repeatability.

habits: Collaborates with production to improve tooling life
